settings_email_base_desc: This shared shell contains the HTML used by all emails. Simple message content is inserted automatically between these two blocks.
settings_email_base_live_preview_desc: The render updates automatically while you edit the header or footer.
settings_email_base_preview_demo:
You received an invitation to join the Jellyfin server.

The button and direct link appear automatically below this message.
settings_email_base_preview_desc: This preview shows the shared shell with a simple message and the standard automatic blocks.
settings_email_base_variables_title: Advanced variables for the base template
settings_email_body_mode_desc: The message editors below are no-code: plain text only. Buttons, links, and system dates are added automatically in the final render.
settings_email_delivery_desc: Vklyuchayte tolko te pisma ili bloki, kotorye JellyGate dolzhen otpravlyat avtomaticheski.
settings_email_templates_desc: Redaktiruyte tolko te soobshcheniya, kotorye deystvitelno ispolzuete. Sektsii sprava delayut stranicu prosche.
settings_email_tpl_email_verification_de: Otpravlyaetsya dlya podtverzhdeniya novogo ili sushchestvuyushchego adresa e-mail pered vosstanovleniem akkaunta i uvedomleniyami.
settings_email_tpl_email_verification_su: Tema pisem dlya podtverzhdeniya e-mail. Peremennye podderzhivayutsya.
settings_email_tpl_post_signup_help_desc: Email Tpl Post Signup Help Desc
settings_email_tpl_pre_signup_help_desc: Email Tpl Pre Signup Help Desc
settings_email_tpl_user_deletion_disable: Email Tpl User Deletion Disable Notice
settings_invite_allow_inviter_grant: Allow inviters to let the new account create invitations

settings_ldap_mode_ldap_only: Tolko LDAP (bez sozdaniya polzovatelei cherez API Jellyfin)
settings_ldap_test_credentials_required: Vvedite testovye login i parol dlya proverki LDAP-plagina Jellyfin.
settings_ldap_tests_desc: Eti testy ne sohranyayut konfiguraciyu. Oni proveryayut LDAP-soedinenie, poisk polzovatelya po nastroennomu atributu vhoda i zatem autentifikaciyu cherez LDAP-plugin Jellyfin.
settings_ldap_user_object_class_help: Ispolzuite auto dlya opredeleniya ili zadayte user, person, inetOrgPerson, posixAccount.
settings_ldap_username_attribute_help: Vyberite LDAP-atribut dlya identifikacii polzovatelei (uid dlya Synology/OpenLDAP, sAMAccountName dlya Active Directory).

settings_email_templates_help: Customize the content of emails sent by JellyGate.
automation_type_sync_ldap_users_desc: Automatically import members from LDAP groups to Jellyfin based on your mappings.
my_account_sponsorship_desc: Generate invitation links for your friends and track your referrals.
my_account_no_invites: You haven't created any sponsorship links yet.
my_account_sponsorship_help: Invite your friends to join Jellyfin using a personalized sponsorship link.
settings_email_language_desc: Each language keeps its own email subjects and content. Use this single selector to switch drafts.
settings_email_variable_instructions: Click inside a subject or message first, then click a variable below to insert it in the right place.
settings_email_logo_desc: Leave empty to use the official Jellyfin logo automatically in previews and outgoing emails.
settings_email_variable_pick_target: Select a subject or message first
